characters.arda_portrait_idle.description: Arda idle dialogue portrait for the first validated loop.

characters.arda_portrait_thinking.description: Arda thinking or hesitating portrait for decision feedback.

characters.arda_portrait_happy.description: Arda happy or relieved portrait for reward feedback.

characters.eda_portrait_idle.description: Eda idle dialogue portrait for the first validated loop.

characters.eda_portrait_thinking.description: Eda analytical thinking portrait for hints and decision feedback.

characters.eda_portrait_happy.description: Eda happy or satisfied portrait for reward feedback.

room.study_book.description: Open history textbook on the desk; should glow softly as the dream portal source.

room.tablet.description: Modern tablet/game device; contrasts with the history book.

room.lamp.description: Warm desk lamp or bedside reading light.

room.book_portal.description: Dream portal effect emerging from the book.

ship.map_table.description: Bandirma map table with route marks for Samsun, Havza, Amasya, and Ankara.

ship.compass.description: Compass or navigation prop on deck.

samsun.rift_core.description: Blue time-rift core for the forgiving strategy layer.

amasya.river_marker.description: Soft river or route marker for Amasya composition.

kongre.unity_stage.description: Unity stage or shared-decision focal prop.

kongre.shared_goal_banner.description: Shared goal banner for congress unity theme.

world_tiles.diorama_ground_blob.description: Large soft terrain plates for modular historical diorama areas.

world_tiles.paper_path.description: Readable main route ribbon art for portrait open-world movement.

world_props.foreground_frame.description: Foreground edge silhouettes that add depth without blocking the player.

world_props.prop_cluster.description: Small themed prop clusters around discovery and companion reaction moments.

landmarks.historical_landmark.description: Large educational focal landmark for each historical unit.

interactables.strategy_node.description: Clean support/build/wave node art with a readable halo.

interactables.companion_reaction_spot.description: Subtle visual cue for short Arda/Eda contextual observations.

fx.rift_focus_ring.description: Dream-rift active objective ring for decision and support nodes.

samsun.telegraph_landmark.description: Stylized telegraph route or station landmark.

samsun.people_landmark.description: Civic gathering square landmark for the people support node.

sky.bandirma.description: Foggy harbor night sky with moon glow, warm earth layers, distant ship lights.

sky.samsun.description: Dawn arrival sky with golden sunrise, rift sparkles, turquoise gradient.

sky.havza.description: Earthy dry afternoon sky with dust atmosphere, olive tan gradient.

sky.amasya.description: Deep navy evening sky with crescent moon, stars, distant mountain silhouettes.

sky.congress.description: Dramatic crimson and navy sunset sky with cloud bands, sun rays, distant flag silhouettes.

collectibles.star_token.description: Gold knowledge star token with cream paper body, 5-point shape, sparkle accents.

collectibles.chapter_badge.description: Historical chapter badge with crimson outer ring, cream inner ring, gold center star, ribbon.

collectibles.knowledge_orb.description: Rift blue energy orb with outer glow, inner rings, sparkle reflections, energy lines.

effects.sparkle_burst.description: Collection sparkle burst with 8-point star rays, outer glow ring, sparkle dots.

effects.pulse_ring.description: Marker pulse ring with concentric rings, cardinal accent dots, core dot.

effects.path_glow.description: Path glow highlight with layered ellipses, core path segment, sparkle dots.
